scripts.start: lerna run empty-cache && lerna run start --parallel
scripts.build-web: lerna bootstrap && (cd packages/studio && SANITY_AUTH_TOKEN=$SANITY_DEPLOY_STUDIO_TOKEN yarn deploy:graphql) && (cd web && GATSBY_SANITY_PROJECT_ID=$SANITY_PROJECT_ID GATSBY_SANITY_DATASET=$SANITY_DATASET yarn build)
